name: Around the World

setup.description: Place 8 balls in a circle around the hole, all roughly 4 feet away, evenly spaced like numbers on a clock.

rules.description: Putt each ball in order around the circle. Every putt is a fresh 4-footer from a new angle.

caption: Same distance, eight different angles -- can you make them all? #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
